titleStmt.title: SII 42.41: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 41. (A.R. No. B. 52 of 1953-54.) Uḷchāla, Kurnool Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab near the centre of the village.
Dated in Śaka 1477, Ānanda, Phālguṇa, śu. 15, corresponding to 1555 A.D., March 8.

Registers a grant of the Vipravinōdi-Varttana collected by the Vipravinōdins from the Brāhmaṇas by Mantramūrti Pina-Basuvaya, (grandson of) Gangādhara-Voḍeyala, (son of) Pina-Vīramarāju of Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajus-śākhā of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, to god Hanumanta of Vuluchala in the Kandanavōli-sīma for the daily offering of lights (dīpārādhana) to the god. It is also stated that the gift was given for the merit of Vipravinōdins viz., Dakshiṇāmūrti, Kēśavayya, Vallabhayya, Varadayya, Chāgalamaṟṟi Parvatayya and Anantayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of crescent-moon, ḍamaru, liṅga, nandi and sun.

śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunēṭi Ānaṁ
da saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvama
hārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajra siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvī
sāmrājyaṁ śē(cē)stuṁḍagānu kaṁdanavōli sīmalōni vulucala hanu
maṁttadēvuniki dīpārādhanaku Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . bhāra
dvāja gōtra Āpastaṁba sūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyuḍaI(ḍai)
na maṁtramūrtti gaṁgādhara voḍiyala pinavīramarāju
kumāruḍu maṁtramūrtti pinabasuvayagāru tama
vipravinōdulu dakṣiṇāmūrti kēśavaya valabhaya vara
yacāgalamaṟi parvataya Anaṁtaya modalaI(lai)na
vipravinōdulaku puṇyaṁgānu ve hmālu ta
ma vipravinōdulaku Iccēvarttanalu hanumaṁttadēvu
niki daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci dīpārādhana bhāradā(dvā)
ja gōtra Āpastaṁba sūtra yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina maṁtra
mūrtti gaṁgādhara voḍiyala From here, the writing on the right side of the stone has peeled off.
(ṁ) basuvayagāru vulucala bhrāṁ
vulucala hanumaṁtta dēvuniki
dhāravōsi Istimi bhī yajuśśā
khādhyāyuṁḍaina gaṁgādhara
basuvayagāru
vulacala hanumaṁtta
dhāravōsi yistimi
[Ācaṁdrā*]rka stā(sthā)yigā
kaṁḍāda The
Digital edition of SII 42.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
